rankings.name: Chevington
key_positive_factors: Official 'Spotlight' selection for the race
Career-best performance on seasonal reappearance at Hereford (2nd after 18-month layoff)
Low mileage 7yo who remains significantly unexposed for this grade
Strong jockey booking with Tom Broughton's 5lb claim
key_risks: Needs to prove he can string back-to-back performances together after a long absence
Market remains very tight, leaving little room for error

rankings.name: Pottersjetamay
key_positive_factors: Demonstrated clear Class 5 ability with three consecutive runner-up finishes earlier in the season
Identified as a 'Main Danger' with significant potential if rediscovering autumn form
Proven stamina over this distance
key_risks: Two recent 'Pulled Up' efforts raise serious questions about current wellbeing
Relatively high weight mark (OR 88) for a horse returning from disappointing runs

rankings.name: Best Night
key_positive_factors: Representing the powerful David Pipe stable with Jack Tudor aboard
Consistent profile with several in-frame finishes in similar handicap hurdles
Market support suggests he is expected to be competitive
key_risks: Often finds one or two too good in the closing stages
Lacks the 'unexposed' profile of the favorite

rankings.name: Bluenose Belle
key_positive_factors: Recent winner at this level (31-1) showing current fitness
Improving profile and tactical versatility in small fields
Finn Lambert's claim is an asset
key_risks: Stepping back into slightly deeper water compared to recent success
Handicap mark (OR 88) is creeping up toward its limit

rankings.name: Jafimgoso
key_positive_factors: Trained by Dan Skelton, always respected in these handicap hurdles
Class 4 experience indicates he has the basic ability to factor here
key_risks: Returns from a break and might need the run to sharpen up

rankings.name: Fond Farewell
key_positive_factors: Low weight (OR 82) makes him a dangerous outsider if finding his feet
Greenall & Guerriero yard is capable of producing a result at a price
key_risks: Shown very little in three starts to date (687-)
Struggling for consistency and jumping fluency

rankings.name: Bongo Man
key_positive_factors: Joint-highest OR in the field (100) indicating theoretical class
Proven in soft conditions if the 'Good to Soft' places come into play
key_risks: Recent 'Pulled Up' effort is a major red flag
Losing sequence stretching back several runs

rankings.name: Regal Cavalier
key_positive_factors: Showed a glimmer of ability with a 3rd place finish last time out
Experienced campaigner at this level
key_risks: Generally struggles to compete with more progressive rivals

rankings.name: Farhh Echo
key_positive_factors: Beau Morgan is a capable young rider
Handicapped to win if rediscovering distant form
key_risks: Looks a shadow of his former self at present

pace_analysis.insight: A moderate pace dictated by Best Night favors the unexposed favorite Chevington, who possesses the tactical speed to track the lead on this sharp track.

market_comparison.adjustment_reason: UPGRADE: Significant market support and 'stable whispers' confirmed (market mover, sharp in training) per late intelligence.
No adjustment: Late intelligence invalidated (November picks) and recent defeat does not report physical issues (sweat/lameness); sticking to ratings.
No intelligence provided; maintaining model ratings.
